overall.description: Gameplay footage from Bloodborne showing a hunter character exploring a gothic Victorian city at night under a cosmic purple sky. The character transitions from ornate indoor corridors to outdoor bridges and plazas, revealing massive creatures perched on cathedral spires, and navigates cobblestone streets toward a grand archway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic interior corridor with ornate stonework

events.description: character opens large ornate doors and enters the interior corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit interior corridor, passing stone pillars and archways

entered.detail: large decorative iron doors with intricate patterns that the character opens to enter
tall gothic stone pillars lining the corridor sides
series of stone archways receding into the distance
ornate metal railings along the corridor edges

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the hunter opening large ornate iron doors and proceeding through a narrow, enclosed gothic corridor. The environment is dimly lit with artificial light, featuring stone pillars, decorative railings, and a tiled floor. The character walks steadily forward through the interior space with no other agents present.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone bridge with view of cosmic sky and cathedral towers

events.description: exits the interior corridor onto an outdoor bridge revealing the night sky
massive spider-like creature becomes visible perched on the distant cathedral tower

agents.ego_description: walking across the stone bridge while observing the massive creature and cosmic sky

entered.detail: ornate iron railings lining both sides of the stone bridge
enormous multi-limbed creature perched atop the gothic cathedral tower
tall spired cathedral with intricate stonework against the purple sky
dark night sky filled with swirling purple and pink cosmic clouds
lit gothic street lamps along the bridge edge

segments.scene_description: The character exits the interior onto an elevated stone bridge, revealing a dramatic outdoor scene under a cosmic purple sky. A massive spider-like creature is visible perched on a distant gothic cathedral tower. The bridge features ornate iron railings and lit lampposts as the character walks forward, transitioning from enclosed to open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular plaza with central bonfire lamp surrounded by gothic architecture

events.description: character stops at the lit lamp and looks around the plaza
camera pans to reveal the massive spider creature visible against the pink clouds

agents.ego_description: walking into the circular plaza, circling the lit lamp while observing the surroundings and sky

entered.detail: open circular cobblestone plaza with patterned pavement
central burning lamp on a stone pedestal providing warm light
stone seating arranged around the plaza perimeter
tall gothic structures with arched windows enclosing the plaza

segments.scene_description: The hunter enters a wide circular plaza featuring a central lit bonfire lamp. The character explores the area, circling the lamp while the camera pans to take in the surrounding gothic architecture and the massive spider creature now visible to the left against the pink cosmic sky. Stone benches and stairs lead off in multiple directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase descending to lower cobblestone street with abandoned carriage

events.description: character ascends stairs to a vista point with bright pink sky
character descends stairs into the lower street area

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to overlook the vista, then descending into a narrow lower street with debris

entered.detail: wide stone stairs leading up and then down between levels
derelict wooden carriage with large wheels parked on the street
confined street with uneven cobblestones and scattered debris
lit lanterns on poles illuminating the narrow street

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the plaza by ascending a stone staircase to a vista point with bright pink clouds, then descends into a narrow, darker cobblestone street. An abandoned wooden carriage sits to the right, and street lanterns provide sparse illumination in this lower, more confined urban area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral archway entrance with massive gates and stone statues

events.description: approaching the grand archway entrance to the cathedral
passing through the massive iron gates into the archway tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking toward and through the imposing cathedral archway, passing between stone statues

entered.detail: massive gothic archway entrance with intricate stone carvings and pointed arch
tall stone statues positioned on either side of the entrance stairs
large decorative iron gates that stand open at the archway entrance
thick roots and vines growing over the interior stone walls of the passage

segments.scene_description: The hunter approaches a massive gothic cathedral archway flanked by stone statues. The character ascends the ornate stairs and passes through the open iron gates into a covered stone passage. Inside, thick roots and vines cover the walls as the character continues toward the exit, where the cosmic purple sky is visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic gothic interior out into a sprawling, cosmic cityscape before descending back into a confined urban passage. It begins with the hunter opening ornate iron doors to traverse a dimly lit, narrow corridor of stone pillars and tiled floors. As the character exits the building, the space opens onto an elevated stone bridge under a dramatic purple sky, revealing a massive spider-like creature perched atop a distant cathedral tower. The scene then expands into a wide circular plaza centered around a lit bonfire lamp, where the camera pans across the surrounding architecture and pink clouds before the hunter ascends a staircase and descends into a dark, narrow cobblestone street featuring an abandoned wooden carriage. Finally, the camera follows the character toward a massive cathedral archway, passing through iron gates and into a covered stone passage overgrown with thick roots and vines.
